mapper.select:
select h.*, hci.id checkInId from habit h left join (select * from habit_check_in where user_id = #{userId} and check_in_date = #{nowDate}) hci on h.id = hci.habit_id
h.user_id = #{userId} and status = 1
and h.habit_type_id = #{habitTypeId}
order by h.create_time desc

select h.*, ht.name as habit_type_name from habit h left join habit_type ht on h.habit_type_id = ht.id and ht.user_id = h.user_id
h.user_id = #{userId} and h.status = 2
and h.habit_type_id = #{habitTypeId}
order by h.archive_date_time desc
